---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Services — Voyara"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.full-bleed .hero style="padding:7rem 1.5rem 4rem;"}
::: {.hero-inner}
[Our services]{.eyebrow}

# One team for the [whole journey]{}

::: {.lead}
Whether you're planning a holiday, applying for a visa, or moving abroad to study — here's exactly how we help.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🗺️
:::
### Tour Planning
Custom day-by-day itineraries, group departures, honeymoon packages, and corporate retreats. We match destinations to your pace, budget, and interests.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🛂
:::
### Visa Processing
Tourist, business, student, and work visas. We provide document checklists, fill and file applications, book biometrics/appointments, and coach you for interviews.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
✈️
:::
### Air Ticketing
Best-fare search across airlines, multi-city routing, group bookings, and date-change support. We rebook fast when plans shift.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🎓
:::
### Study Abroad
University and course selection, application and admission support, scholarship guidance, student-visa filing, and pre-departure orientation.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🏨
:::
### Hotels & Stays
Hand-picked accommodation across budgets, from boutique guesthouses to luxury resorts, with best-rate guarantees where available.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🚐
:::
### Transfers & Local Experiences
Airport pickups, private drivers, day tours, and curated local experiences added right into your itinerary.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🛡️
:::
### Travel Insurance
Medical and trip-cancellation cover arranged alongside your booking, including Schengen-compliant policies.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
💬
:::
### 24/7 Support
A dedicated advisor and round-the-clock assistance while you're on the road, in any time zone.
:::
:::

:::

::: {.cta-banner}
## Not sure which you need?
Send us a quick message — we'll tell you exactly what applies to your situation.

[Talk to an advisor](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
:::

<script src="assets/js/reveal.js"></script>
